{{Quote|Mesa sorry. No haven time for yousa right now.|Lob Dizz|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Lob Dizz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who specialized in submersible transport engines and guidance systems. She was famous on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] for her work on high-speed [[bongo]]s.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Lob_Dizz_Adventures.jpg|thumb|right||Lob Dizz in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]]]
Lob Dizz was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]]. The game was shut down on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Using an in-game text command revealed her to be a [[Gender/Legends|male]]. However, this was [[Canon|non-canon]], and likely a limitation in game mechanics which prevented certain [[Species/Legends|species]] from being designated as female.
